label.name: sc_stitch
label.svg: <line x1="25" y1="45" x2="25" y2="15" data-type="edge" data-node-from="1" data-node-to="2"></line> <circle r="1" cx="25" cy="45" data-type="element node" data-element-id="1" data-node-id="1" data-label-name="base"></circle> <circle r="1" cx="25" cy="15" data-type="element node" data-element-id="2" data-node-id="2" data-label-name="head"></circle>
